name: Test Run
description: Run tests using the project's configured framework. Returns structured results with pass/fail/skip counts and failure details.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: What to run: a file path, test name pattern, or 'all'. Defaults to 'all'.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter tests by name pattern (passed to framework's --grep or -t flag)

parameters.name: watch
parameters.description: Run in watch mode (re-run on file changes)

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Include full test names and timing in output

outputDescription: Object with {passed, failed, skipped, total, duration, failures: [{testName, file, error, stackTrace}], coverage?: {lines, branches, functions, statements}}.
author: openspace
